commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Thus shall you separate the children of Israel from their uncleanness; that they die not in their uncleanness, when they defile my tabernacle that is among them. So the Septuagint also read. Hebrew, "Thus you shall remove. From their filth. "(Houbigant) Filth. God threatens to kill them, if they approach unclean. (Menochius) St. Jerome (in Gal. ) understands this of those abominable sins, which ought not to be mentioned. (Worthington).
